scripts.dev: echo "Run 'npm run dev:api' and 'npm run dev:web' in separate terminals"
scripts.dev:clean:api: pkill -f 'ts-node.*src/server' || true; sleep 1; cd apps/api && npm run start:dev
scripts.dev:clean:web: pkill -f 'next dev' || true; sleep 1; cd apps/web && rm -rf .next && npm run dev
scripts.dev:clean:all: npm run dev:clean:api & npm run dev:clean:web
scripts.db:backup: mkdir -p backups && docker exec maint_agent_db pg_dump -U postgres maint_agent > backups/dev_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql && echo Backup saved to backups/
scripts.db:restore: echo Usage: docker exec -i maint_agent_db psql -U postgres maint_agent < backups/FILENAME.sql
scripts.roadmap:watch: npx nodemon --watch ROADMAP.json --watch apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma --watch apps/api/src/workflows --ext ts,json,prisma --exec 'node scripts/generate-roadmap.js'
